findings.detail: Node count 8 (within 3–8). All bold labels ≤ 4 words. All labels trace directly to corpus sections 5.2 (pipeline stages), 5.3 (missing override), 5.8 (5 functioning properties). Title 'Where Was the Human Override?' sits in config title: field as governing question — not a ghost node. No bare acronyms. Side-by-side panels layout (flowchart LR + MAIN TB + SIDE TB) matches intent.

Every node maps to a named corpus phrase: 'Application submitted' (5.2 stage 1), 'Completeness + eligibility checks' (5.2 stages 2–3), 'AI personal qualities scoring' (5.2 stage 4), 'Human override checkpoint' (5.3), 'Final ranking and offer' (5.2 stage 5), 'Defined · Sampled' (5.8 props 1–2), 'Documented · Empowered' (5.8 props 3–4), 'Monitored (rate tracked)' (5.8 prop 5). No scope-creep nodes.

Dashed arrow aiscoring -.-> final labeled 'override absent / theater' correctly models the missing-override path from section 5.3. Solid arrow through hitlchk labeled 'healthy path' models the intended flow. Both arcs together make the contrast legible.

app:::start (blue #a5d8ff), checks/aiscoring:::auto (purple #d0bfff), hitlchk:::hitl (yellow #fff3bf stroke-width:3), p12/p34/p5:::act (blue #a5d8ff), final:::done (green #b2f2bb). All tiers correctly assigned.
Soft note only: 12px italic subtitles are borderline at LMS reader width. Non-blocking — 12px is at the recommended floor from SKILL.md. No revision required.

mmdc render not executed in this environment (no mmdc on PATH, no package.json). Source pre-flight passes all checks. PNG render should be executed by the orchestrator or CI step using: mmdc -i <mmd-path> -o <png-path> -w 1400 -b transparent
